description: A semantic annotation linking a concept (or other entity) to a specific byte range in a transcript. Produced by enrichment, indexed by the appview.

transcriptUri.description: AT URI of the tv.ionosphere.transcript this annotates.

talkUri.description: AT URI of the tv.ionosphere.talk (denormalized for convenience).

conceptUri.description: AT URI of the tv.ionosphere.concept being referenced.

byteStart.description: Start byte offset in the transcript text.

byteEnd.description: End byte offset in the transcript text.

text.description: The matched text span (for human readability).
